mapper.select: select * from ServiceArea where SAName = #{SAName} and SADirection = #{SADirection}
mapper.insert: insert into ServiceArea (SAName, SADirection, WayNum, CompactParking, LargeParking, DisabledParking, Address, Lat, Lng Tel, ShopCode) values (#{SAName}, #{SADirection}, #{WayNum}, #{CompactParking}, #{LargeParking}, #{DisabledParking}, #{Address}, #{Lat}, #{Lng}, #{Tel}, #{ShopCode})
mapper.select: Select * from ServiceArea where SAName Like concat ('%', #{name}, '%');
